---
title: "About"
---

I am a **Data Science professional** passionate about building intelligent, data-driven systems that bridge the gap between theoretical research and real-world applications. With a strong foundation in **Computer Science** (B.Tech.) and specialized expertise in **Data Science** (M.Tech.), I bring a blend of research, engineering, and practical problem-solving skills to every project.

## Education

::: timeline

::: timeline-item
### M.Tech. in Data Science
**Defence Institute of Advanced Technology, Pune**

*August 2025*

- **CGPA:** 9.0
- **Relevant Coursework:** Deep Learning for Computer Vision, Advanced Optimization, Advanced Statistics, Big Data Analytics
- **Thesis:** A Physics-Informed Diffusion-Based Framework for Enhancing Underwater Images in High Turbidity Conditions
:::

::: timeline-item
### B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering
**Echelon Institute of Technology, Faridabad**

*July 2023*

- **CGPA:** 9.021 (First Division with Honours)
- **Relevant Coursework:** Data Structures, Algorithms, OS, DBMS, Compiler Design, Computer Networks
- **MOOCs:** Deep Learning, AI: Knowledge Representation and Reasoning, Introduction to Internet of Things, Machine Intelligence and Brain Research
:::

:::

## Experience

::: timeline

::: timeline-item
### Associate AI Engineer 1
**Griphic**

*22 October 2025 – Present*

- End-to-end development for a CAD retrieval application that retrieves similar CAD designs from a library based on a query sketch and a set of tags
- Development of a Digital Twin Builder capable of designing and deploying Intelligent Digital Twins for predictive analytics and control
:::

::: timeline-item
### Research Intern
**ABB Corporate Research Center**

*6 January 2025 – 27 June 2025*

- Designed and implemented frameworks for efficient machine learning in resource-constrained environments using TensorFlow and Keras
- Improved collaborative learning techniques in federated settings with emphasis on data privacy and computational efficiency
:::

::: timeline-item
### Intern
**FrugalX**

*10 January 2023 – 10 May 2023*

- Developed an image similarity search framework leveraging artificial neural networks and Milvus to significantly improve accuracy and efficiency of data retrieval processes
- Integrated MySQL databases to enable fast and reliable mapping and retrieval of filenames and IDs
:::

:::

## Publications

::: publication-item
### Performance of SOTA Underwater Image Enhancement Models on Underwater Images with High Turbidity

*A. Kumar and B. Ramkrishna*

**Proceedings of the 2025 National Conference on Communications (NCC)**, New Delhi, India, pp. 1-6, 2025

[DOI: 10.1109/NCC63735.2025.10983784](https://doi.org/10.1109/NCC63735.2025.10983784)
:::

## Certifications

::: certification-list

- Applied AI Lab: Deep Learning for Computer Vision — WorldQuant University
- SQL Associate — DataCamp
- Data Scientist Career Track — 365 Data Science
- BCG Data Science Job Simulation — Forage
- Quantium Data Analytics Job Simulation — Forage
- Applied Data Science Lab — WorldQuant University
- Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate — Coursera
- Meta Database Engineer Professional Certificate — Coursera
- Accounting Data Analytics by University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign — Coursera
- Data Analysis with Python — freeCodeCamp
- SQL Advanced — HackerRank

:::

## Technical Skills

### Languages
::: skills-grid
<span class="skill-badge">Python</span>
<span class="skill-badge">SQL</span>
<span class="skill-badge">C</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Java</span>
:::

### Libraries & Frameworks
::: skills-grid
<span class="skill-badge">TensorFlow</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Keras</span>
<span class="skill-badge">PyTorch</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Scikit-learn</span>
<span class="skill-badge">NumPy</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Pandas</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Matplotlib</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Seaborn</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Plotly</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Dash</span>
<span class="skill-badge">TextBlob</span>
<span class="skill-badge">WordCloud</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Tweepy</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Milvus</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Flower</span>
<span class="skill-badge">SciPy</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Statsmodels</span>
:::

### Concepts
::: skills-grid
<span class="skill-badge">Machine Learning</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Deep Learning</span>
<span class="skill-badge">NLP</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Computer Vision</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Time Series Forecasting</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Clustering</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Generative AI</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Federated Learning</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Statistical Testing</span>
<span class="skill-badge">A/B Testing</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Feature Engineering</span>
<span class="skill-badge">EDA</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Vector Similarity Search</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Data Cleaning</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Data Visualization</span>
:::

### Tools & Platforms
::: skills-grid
<span class="skill-badge">MySQL</span>
<span class="skill-badge">SQLite</span>
<span class="skill-badge">MongoDB</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Tableau</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Streamlit</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Docker</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Jupyter Notebook</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Git</span>
<span class="skill-badge">GitHub</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Linux CLI</span>
<span class="skill-badge">API Integration</span>
:::

## Achievements

- **Qualified GATE 2023 (CS)** with score of 513
- Received **Director's Award** at Echelon Institute of Technology

---

*Let's connect to explore how data and AI can create meaningful change.*

[📧 Email](mailto:akcoolkmr@gmail.com) · [🔗 LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ayush-kumar-4234b8155/) · [💻 GitHub](https://github.com/Harper2123) · [📄 Resume](resume/Entire_Resume.pdf)
